description_long: This is a modern, two-story house surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with grass, trees, and hedges. The house features a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a mix of white and wood-textured exterior panels. The front yard includes a paved walkway leading to a recessed entryway with double doors and a small potted plant. On one side, there is a patio area with outdoor seating and a small swimming pool, while the other side has a shaded terrace. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary urban residences.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, wood accents, and a landscaped yard with a pool and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, patio, pool, and surrounding fence with greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the shaded terrace, side windows, and the continuation of the wooden fence and landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a wide lawn, symmetrical window arrangement, and balcony above the ground floor.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the main entryway, double doors, potted plant, and a clear view of the pool area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed double doors with a small step, minimal overhang, and a potted plant accent
